name: Expert review

## Reviewer

- **Name:**
- **Affiliation:**
- **ORCID (optional):**
- **Expertise:** (e.g. SSc rheumatology, systems biology, single-cell, etc.)
- **Co-authorship sought:** yes / no (see `CONTRIBUTING.md` § 5 for thresholds)

## Scope of review

- [ ] Whole map (overview pass)
- [ ] Module M1 — IFN-I signalling
- [ ] Module M2 — TGF-β / fibroblast → myofibroblast
- [ ] Module M3 — EndoMT / vasculopathy
- [ ] Module M4 — IL-6 / Th2 / B-cell crosstalk
- [ ] Inter-module crosstalk
- [ ] Translational use case (omics overlay)
- [ ] Other (specify):

## Map version reviewed

- Commit SHA or release tag:
- MINERVA URL (if applicable):

## Comments

For each comment, classify as `must-fix`, `nice-to-have`, or `discussion`.

1.

### nice-to-have
